command:
echo '' | base64 -d > /tmp/wpb.txt
curl -s -X POST http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/chat   -H 'Content-Type: application/json'   -d "$(python3 -c "import json; p=open('/tmp/wpb.txt').read(); print(json.dumps({'model':'qwen3-coder:30b','messages':[{'role':'user','content':p}],'stream':False,'options':{'temperature':0.1}}))") "   | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
print('WPB_MODEL:', d.get('model'), 'EVAL:', d.get('eval_count'), 'in', round(d.get('total_duration',0)/1e9,1),'s')
print(d.get('message',{}).get('content',''))
" 2>&1
echo DONE_1999
